title: Zyliss E980139 Ultimate Non-Stick Saucepan with Lid, 18cm/2L, Forged Aluminium, Black, Rockpearl Plus Non-Stick Technology, Suitable for All Hobs Including Induction
availability_text: Only 7 left in stock (more on the way).
features: PFOA FREE - 3 x multi layer Swiss engineered cookware, PFOA free non-stick coating: nothing sticks and no oil or butter needed!
SUITABLE FOR ALL HOBS - The hard wearing coating is Metal tool safe and dot induction base is suitable for all hobs, including induction
OVEN SAFE - Includes tempered glass lid and a ergonomic soft grip handle, oven safe upto 180°C
EVEN HEAT DISTRIBUTION - Robust forged aluminium construction ensures an even heat distribution providing great results with every use
NON-STICK GUARANTEE - This product comes with a 10 year non-stick guarantee and a 5 year product guarantee, it is even safe to use in the dishwasher
description: From the manufacturer 70 years of delicious memories With over 70 years of experience in designing high-end food preparation tools, utensils and gadgets, it is easy to see how Zyliss has become an internationally respected brand, favoured by everyday cooks as well as gourmet chefs. Zyliss now boasts an appealing and distinctive portfolio of thoughtfully designed, carefully constructed kitchen tools. Ultimate Cookware When performance is key, you can trust Zyliss to support you in the kitchen. Zyliss Ultimate pans are dependable pans built to withstand everyday use. Constructed of forged aluminum, the pans feature Swiss nonstick technology with a combination of a textured surface and a multi-layer coating that provides superior nonstick performance and healthier cooking, eliminating the need for oil or butter. Made of forged aluminum. Ergonomic soft-touch handle All heat sources including induction PFAO free Suitable for metal utensils. Even heat distribution Resistant to oven and grill heat up to 180°C Dishwasher safe Rockpearl+ Non-Stick Swiss Technology 3 x multi layer Swiss engineered PFAO free non-stick coating: nothing sticks and no oil or butter needed! Safe With Metal Utensils Ultimate pans are made from forged aluminium, making them more durable and safe for use with metal tools. Induction Compatible and Oven Safe Ultimate pans are suitable for all hobs, including induction and pans are oven/grill safe up to 180°C. Dishwasher Safe All Ultimate pans are easily cleaned and dishwasher safe. Discover our entire range of Ultimate cookware!
